nasb.text: He shall live with you in your midst, in the place which he shall choose in one of your towns where it pleases him; you shall not mistreat him.

esv.text: He shall dwell with you, in your midst, in the place that he shall choose within one of your towns, wherever it suits him. You shall not wrong him.

cnv.text: 他要在你中間和你同住，住在他自己選擇的地方，住在他喜歡的城市，你不可欺負他。

ccb.text: 要让他们在你们当中选择他们喜欢的城邑与你们同住，不可压迫他们。
